name: Cranberry-Honey-Pecan Crunch Pie
recipeIngredient: Baked Pie Crust, 9-inch with Fluted Rim
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the cranberries, orange juice, and honey. Cook uncovered over low heat for 15 minutes if using fresh cranberries or 20 minutes if using frozen berries.
2. Allow the mixture to cool, then puree in a blender and return to the saucepan.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together cornstarch and cold water. Stir into the cranberry mixture; bring to a boil and cook until thickened.
4. Stir in orange extract. Cool completely, then pour into the prepared pie shell.
5. Evenly sprinkle the topping over the cranberry mixture: Combine brown sugar, honey, and butter in a medium saucepan; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until smooth. Stir in pecan halves until well coated.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until the top is bubbly. Cool on a wire rack. Serve at room temperature or chilled. Yields 10 servings.
